title: Smoky Ukrainian Beef Stew
description: A hearty beef stew with smoky flavors from the Ukrainian countryside, served with a side of crusty bread.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef in batches until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion and bell pepper to the pot, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the flour to the pot and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Gradually add the broth, whisking until smooth, and bring to a boil.
Return the beef to the pot and add the paprika, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven. Bake for 2 1/2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Remove the pot from the oven and stir in the water. Bring the stew to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
Serve with crusty bread, if desired.
